name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: Silent Court
depiction: A circle of courtiers whispering behind a king
effect: Target creature within 90 feet must make a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or be silenced for [[1d4]] rounds. If they fail, they cannot speak or cast spells with verbal components 🤐

name: Archmage's Edict
effect: The next spell that requires you to make a save within a minute is countered unless the caster passes a DC [[2d6+6]] Intelligence Save. If they fail, they take [[2d6]] psychic damage and cannot cast spells until the end of their next turn 🧙‍♂️

name: Jester's Wit
depiction: A jester goading attacks away from a king
effect: Any number of targets within 60 feet of you have disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you for the next [[1d4]] rounds 🤡

name: Executioner's Gift
depiction: A huge bespoke axe with a royal crest
effect: For the next [[1d4]] rounds, a creature within 60 feet of you has advantage on attack rolls and disadvantage on saving throws 🪓

name: Court Whispers
depiction: Shadowy figures whispering to each other in a darkened hall
